trades.sentiment_summary: CleanSpark (CLSK) shares dropped over 13% to $12.20 amid broader market decline, following a recent -4.21% fall on July 25, 2025, despite a positive short-term rising trend forecast of 49.05% over 3 months[1][4]. Transformative FY 2025 results reported record $766.3M revenue and $1.2B bitcoin holdings, but no new articles confirm coverage in the last 24 hours[2].

Omnicom completed its acquisition of Interpublic Group (IPG) on November 26, 2025, in a stock-for-stock deal where IPG shareholders received 0.344 Omnicom shares per IPG share, creating a combined company with over $25 billion in revenue trading under OMC.[6] No other news articles from the last 24 hours (December 21-22, 2025) were identified in the search results. Earlier reports noted mixed Q3 earnings with EPS beat but revenue miss, alongside a 'Hold' consensus and bearish technical sentiment.[1][2]
